name: BrowserStack
description: Monitor BrowserStack automated testing platform for test coverage and account compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to BrowserStack at https://browserstack.com
2. Go to Account > Summary to find your Username and Access Key
3. Enter your Username and Access Key below

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies BrowserStack automated testing is configured for validating code changes

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Verifies BrowserStack builds are running to validate code quality
